_metadata.description: Seed data for the franchises reference table

data.name: Transformers
data.notes: Hasbro/Takara Tomy transforming robot franchise. Originally adapted from Takara's Diaclone and Micro Change lines (1984).

data.name: G.I. Joe
data.notes: Hasbro military action figure franchise. A Real American Hero line (1982-1994) and subsequent reboots.

data.name: Star Wars
data.notes: Lucasfilm/Disney space opera franchise. Kenner original line (1978-1985), Hasbro modern lines.

data.name: Macross
data.notes: Studio Nue/Big West mecha franchise. Super Dimension Fortress Macross (1982) and sequels. Known as Robotech in the West.
